heading: Taxpaid wine bottling house
label: 5352 Taxpaid wine bottling house
text: Any person bottling, packaging, or repackaging taxpaid wines shall, before commencing such operations, make application to the Secretary and receive permission to operate. Such premises shall be known as “tax-paid wine bottling houses.”
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5352, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 663Pub. L. 85–859

Amendments1979— struck out “at premises other than the bottling premises of a distilled spirits plant” after “taxpaid wines”.Pub. L. 96–391976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
Effective Date of 1979 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–39section 810 of Pub. L. 96–39section 5001 of this titleJan. 1, 1980
